name: cz-agents-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol servers for Czech government & business data
author: Martin Havel <martin.havel@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@czagents/shared && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/ares && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/cnb && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/sanctions && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/isir && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/adis && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/dd && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/realestate && npm run build --workspace=@czagents/eu-registry
